meaning: n.英国从城市或大学选出的议员
examples: The Burgess Shale formation also has fossils of many extinct representatives of modern animal groups.
Fossil formations like the Burgess Shale show that evolution cannot always be thought of as a slow progression.
Led by Burgess, the amtracs reached the camp smoothly.
You get the feeling there is plenty more to come from Sam Burgess, too.
Prof Burgess said higher marks could possibly be equated to improvements in the quality of teaching.
